prompt: I have a fullstack app (Next.js frontend, Node.js API, PostgreSQL). I want to validate them in parallel using 2 agents. What are the pitfalls and how do I structure the evidence directories?
expected_output: Should explain that Web and API can parallelize (independent validation journeys) but Database must be seeded before API validation starts (sequential dependency). Should show exact directory structure: e2e-evidence/web-validation/, e2e-evidence/api-validation/, and explain why overlap is forbidden.
